exploration_notes: The error `ErrSnapshotTemporarilyUnavailable` is defined in `raft/storage.go` (line 36-38) as a sentinel error returned by the `Storage.Snapshot()` interface method. The snapshot availability check during Raft log catch-up occurs in `raft/raft.go` in the `maybeSendAppend` method (line 446-459): when a leader cannot send log entries to a follower (entries are compacted), it attempts to send a snapshot via `r.raftLog.snapshot()`.
